title: PhonePe South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: PhonePe South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
PhonePe South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!
